soft_findings.detail: Node A4 combines the 'return keyword fires' step and the 'caller receives result' step into a single node to stay within the 8-node ceiling. The subtitle 'return 74.0 → result = 74.0' makes both steps legible. Beginner readability is preserved; no information is lost.

verdict: PASS — 8 nodes across two symmetric side-by-side panels; all labels trace to §5 Core Concepts (parameter, argument, function body, return keyword, implicit None); both WITH-return and WITHOUT-return contrast cases present; linear single-path flow in each panel; scope clean (no advanced Python constructs); beginner-readable edge labels explain each transition step; subgraph backgrounds differentiated (blue-tinted PANEL_A, red-tinted PANEL_B) for visual contrast. PNG render via 'mmdc -i <mmd_path> -o <png_path> -w 1400 -b transparent' must be executed in the local environment; source structure mirrors the proven topic 12-1 golden pattern.

preflight.mermaid_parse: pass — flowchart LR top-level, two direction-TB subgraphs, :::classDef suffix notation, style declarations for subgraph backgrounds, classDef block at end. Mirrors the proven 12-1 diagram.mmd structure.
preflight.node_count: pass — 8 nodes total (A1–A4 in PANEL_A, B1–B4 in PANEL_B), within 6–8 range
preflight.label_discipline: pass — all bold labels are 3–4 words maximum; no bare unexplained acronyms; all labels trace to §5 Core Concepts
preflight.concept_fidelity: pass — nodes cover: call site (argument), parameter slot, function body, return keyword, implicit None. No downstream concepts (decorators, *args, **kwargs, closures, classes) present.
preflight.jargon_label: pass — 'Parameter Slot' and 'Implicit None returned' are corpus-defined terms from §5; no unexplained acronyms
preflight.title_discipline: pass — governing concept 'Parameters and Return Values — What Goes In and What Comes Out' in config title: field, not a node or ghost annotation
preflight.single_path: pass — A1→A2→A3→A4 is a clean linear flow; B1→B2→B3→B4 is a clean linear flow; no branching within either panel
preflight.both_panels: pass — PANEL_A (WITH return) and PANEL_B (WITHOUT return) both present; contrast is the central pedagogical point of the diagram intent
preflight.color_discipline: pass — callSite (#4A90D9 blue), param (#7CB9E8 light blue), body (#E8F4FD pale blue), retVal (#27AE60 green), noneVal (#E74C3C red) — all match the task-specified classDef palette; subgraph backgrounds differentiated
preflight.scope_discipline: pass — all 8 nodes map to §5 Core Concepts phrases for topic 12.2 only
